name: Golf Lounge 18
about: Golf Lounge 18 is an indoor golf facility equipped with TrackMan 4 simulators and available for various activities including league play, private lessons, and event hosting. The venue offers a social atmosphere with a full bar, TVs for sports viewing, and food and beverage service. Bay reservations can be made up to 21 days in advance for members and 7 days for non-members, with walk-ins also welcome. Their technology is focused on performance improvement with TrackMan 4 Dual Radar, trusted by professionals and offering a library of over 450 world-famous courses.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art TrackMan 4 dual radar technology for accurate ball and club tracking
Access to a vast library of over 450 world-famous golf courses
Social atmosphere with a full bar and multiple TVs for sports viewing
Junior and ladies-specific instruction programs available

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen available with an expanded food menu served during operating hours.

simulator_hardware.notes: Dual Radar Technology, trusted by hundreds of pros

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, players are expected to bring their own golf clubs to use with the simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not permitted, as the venue offers its own full bar and expanded food and beverage menu.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Time to play 18 holes can vary but is typically completed in 1-2 hours depending on group size and play pace.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Golf Lounge 18 offers a Junior Academy with group instruction and clinics, making it suitable for children to learn and play.
